title: Ecom Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
